Issues: Potential IP infringement risk. The character design heavily draws on established anime/manga archetypes (e.g., ki blasts, transformative powers). Thorough vetting is needed to ensure the design is sufficiently original and not too close to existing copyrighted material to prevent legal action.
The high contrast and vibrant color palette are excellent for print, but overuse of extreme reds and yellows could require color adjustments for optimal print stability.
